title: Searching Past Sessions & Conversations
description: How to search everything from past sessions. The drift.session_events table stores EVERY message, thought, tool result, and output from every session.

sections.primary_source: PostgreSQL drift.session_events — 36K+ rows, EVERY session event stored

key_columns: event_type (varchar) — user_message, thinking, output, tool_result, tool_call
content (text) — FULL content of the event

search_patterns.by_content: SELECT id, event_type, event_time, content_preview FROM drift.session_events WHERE content LIKE '%search term%' ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 20
search_patterns.by_time: SELECT * FROM drift.session_events WHERE event_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY event_time DESC
search_patterns.by_session: SELECT * FROM drift.session_events WHERE session_id = (SELECT MAX(session_id) FROM drift.sessions) ORDER BY sequence_num
search_patterns.by_type: SELECT * FROM drift.session_events WHERE event_type = 'output' AND content LIKE '%shipped%' ORDER BY event_time DESC

sections.tip: ALWAYS search session_events FIRST when asked about past work, discussions, or what happened in previous sessions. It has everything.
